en.name: Level 54 — Stairwell Of Spirals
en.shortDescription: An infinite spiraling stairwell of decaying wooden steps and damp blue walls, threaded with mysterious hallways and rare entities.
en.atmosphere: Damp and moldy, water dripping down the walls; creaking stairs and distant ocean sounds deepen a pervasive loneliness.
en.tips: Avoid the water-filled rooms and stay alert for rare entities. Use the visible doors strategically to reach safer levels.
